title: What did you do yesterday?
learningGoal: Write sentences about past events using regular verbs (-ed), irregular verbs, and negative forms (didn't).
instructions:
あなたが昨日したことについて、英語で3つの文章を書いてください。(Write three sentences about what you did yesterday.)
以下の条件をすべて満たしてください。
1. 規則動詞（〜ed がつく動詞）を1つ使う（例：played, watched）
2. 不規則動詞（形が変わる動詞）を1つ使う（例：went, ate, saw）
3. 否定文（didn't を使った文）を1つ使う
※didn't の後ろの動詞は原形に戻ることに注意！
writingPrompt: Write 3 sentences about what you did yesterday. Use one regular verb (-ed), one irregular verb (like went or ate), and one negative sentence (didn't).
promptGoal: To actively construct affirmative and negative past tense sentences using both regular and irregular verbs.

wordBank.baseTranslation: 遊んだ、〜をした（規則動詞）
行った（go の過去形・不規則動詞）
食べた（eat の過去形・不規則動詞）

referenceHints: 不規則動詞の例：go → went, eat → ate, see → saw, have → had
「I didn't went」は間違いです。「I didn't go」のように、didn't の後は原形を使います。

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: I played tennis yesterday. I went to a nice restaurant. I didn't eat meat.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: アイ プレイド テニス イエスタデイ。アイ ウェント トゥ ア ナイス レストラン。アイ ディドント イート ミート。
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: 私は昨日テニスをしました。素敵なレストランに行きました。お肉は食べませんでした。
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect. Uses regular (played), irregular (went), and negative (didn't eat).

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: I watched a movie last night. I had pizza for dinner. I didn't sleep well.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: アイ ウォッチト ア ムービー ラスト ナイト。アイ ハッド ピザ フォー ディナー。アイ ディドント スリープ ウェル。
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: 昨夜、映画を見ました。夕食にピザを食べました。よく眠れませんでした。

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user use a verb ending in -ed correctly?
Did the user use a correctly conjugated irregular verb (e.g., went, ate)?
Did the user use 'didn't' with a base verb?
Did the user avoid the double past mistake (e.g., no 'didn't went')?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: I [regular verb + ed]. I [irregular verb past]. I didn't [base verb].
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Must include at least one -ed verb, one irregular past verb, and one 'didn't + base verb'. Must NOT use 'didn't + past verb'.

criteria.name: Past Tense Mechanics
criteria.description: Correctly forms affirmative past verbs (both types) and negative past verbs.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great writing! You perfectly demonstrated how to talk about the past in English.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please check your sentences. Did you include an '-ed' word? Did you include a changed word like 'went' or 'ate'? Did you use 'didn't'?
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try. Check your negative sentence. Make sure you used the base verb after didn't (e.g., 'didn't go', NOT 'didn't went').

hintText: Make sure you don't write 'I didn't played'. It must be 'I didn't play'.
commonMistakes: Using present tense verbs (I go, I play) when talking about yesterday.
